mnemonics: Class is like a container for code
Package is like a folder in Java where classes are stored
keyPoints: A package is declared with the 'package' keyword followed by the package name.

The main difference between public and default (or private) access is that public members can be accessed from anywhere, default members can only be accessed from within the class itself or from subclasses in the same package, and private members can only be accessed from within the class itself.
